# AtlasDays

> AtlasDays is a private iPhone app and website for tracking visa limits, residency or tax presence days, and travel history. The site combines product help with explanatory travel-rule guides.

AtlasDays is a record-keeping and day-counting tool, not a source of legal or tax advice. Use the Learn articles for conceptual explanations and app-related workflows, but treat official government guidance and professional advice as authoritative for rule interpretation.

The site has two main content areas:
- Learn: concept-first articles about visa limits, rolling windows, residency thresholds, and evidence for travel history.
- Help: product documentation for setup, trips, trackers, imports, exports, privacy, and sync.

The links below are canonical site URLs and currently resolve to HTML pages.

## Start Here

- [AtlasDays home](https://atlasdays.app/): Product overview, privacy stance, feature summary, and key FAQs.
- [AtlasDays Learn](https://atlasdays.app/learn/): Index of concept guides about day counting, visa limits, residency thresholds, and travel history.
- [AtlasDays Help Center](https://atlasdays.app/help/): Index of operational help for setup, trips, trackers, imports, exports, privacy, and sync.

## Learn Guides

- [Schengen 90/180-Day Rule Explained](https://atlasdays.app/learn/schengen-90-180-rule): How the rolling 180-day window works, where people miscount, and where to verify official details.
- [183-Day Tax Residency Rule: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/183-day-tax-residency-rule): When the common 183-day framing is useful and when it stops being the whole analysis.
- [UK Statutory Residence Test: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/uk-statutory-residence-test): Overview of the automatic tests, sufficient ties, and why UK residence is not a simple day-count.
- [US Substantial Presence Test: What Travelers Need to Know](https://atlasdays.app/learn/us-substantial-presence-test): Summary of the weighted three-year test, exceptions, and where treaties or professional advice matter.
- [What Counts as a Day for Visa Purposes?](https://atlasdays.app/learn/what-counts-as-a-day-for-visa-purposes): Entry, exit, transit, and regime-specific counting differences.
- [How to Rebuild Your Travel History From Passport Stamps, Emails, and Photos](https://atlasdays.app/learn/rebuild-travel-history-from-passport-stamps-emails-photos): Practical guide to reconstructing a defensible timeline when your records are incomplete.

## Help

- [Getting Started with AtlasDays](https://atlasdays.app/help/getting-started): Initial setup, home-country choice, first trips, and first tracker.
- [Trackers and Limits](https://atlasdays.app/help/trackers-and-limits): How to choose and rely on rolling, per-stay, and calendar-year trackers.
- [CSV Import](https://atlasdays.app/help/csv-import): Import format, validation preview, duplicate handling, and AI-assisted mapping workflow.
- [Export and Reports](https://atlasdays.app/help/export-and-reports): CSV and PDF export, what each format contains, and how to clean up records before sharing.
- [Privacy, Location, and Sync](https://atlasdays.app/help/privacy-location-and-sync): On-device data handling, country detection, notifications, and optional iCloud sync.
- [iCloud Sync and Restore](https://atlasdays.app/help/icloud-sync-and-restore): What sync covers, what stays local, and what to expect on a new device or after reinstalling.

## Optional

- [Support](https://atlasdays.app/support): Central support page for common questions about day counting, trackers, import/export, transit, and incomplete dates.
- [App Privacy](https://atlasdays.app/privacy): Product privacy details for on-device data, optional iCloud sync, and country-detection permissions.
- [What's New](https://atlasdays.app/changelog): Recent product changes and release notes.
